scores.notes: Text accuracy suffers from minor typos (e.g., 'MR D.I.Y.(H)' instead of 'MR D.I.Y. (M)', 'PERINDUSIRIAN' instead of 'PERINDUSTRIAN'). Table structure is disrupted by mixed content. Numeric precision is good with minor rounding differences. Layout is somewhat garbled with invoice details mixed into address. Completeness is high but some irrelevant text is included.
